description_long: This rickshaw features a boxy, angular body with a metallic finish, accented by copper-colored trim and mechanical components. The front is equipped with two prominent, cylindrical headlights and a textured metallic bumper, while the sides display open doorways and visible interior space. The roof is solid and flat, with mechanical fixtures and a circular component mounted on top. The rear of the vehicle is reinforced with a ribbed metallic panel and copper-colored supports, suggesting durability. The side panels are adorned with stylized graphics and mechanical elements, including visible axles and wheels. The overall design combines utilitarian function with a slightly futuristic, industrial aesthetic.
description: A metallic, boxy rickshaw with copper accents, open sides, and prominent headlights, featuring a solid roof and industrial details.
description_view_0: Front view shows two large cylindrical headlights, a flat roof, and a metallic bumper.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals an open doorway, visible interior, and mechanical fixtures on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights a ribbed metallic panel, copper supports, and the back ends of the headlights.
description_view_3: Right side view displays another open doorway, stylized graphics, and mechanical roof details.
attribute_passenger_seating_arrangement: Two forward-facing seats positioned behind the driver, side by side.
